title: afzelia scabra
intro: Afzelia scabra, also known as the wujan or jengkol tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant's bark, seeds, and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Afzelia scabra include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve digestion, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Afzelia scabra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and its seeds can be used in cooking and as a source of oil.
